equation_progression.latex: The vacuum energy density at the TZP is defined as $\rho$\_vacT=1u\_T4 $\int$0$\omega$\_cutќЈ($\omega$) вДП$\omega$ d$\omega$\rho\\_{vac}\textsuperscript{{T}=\frac{1}{u\\_{T}}4}\,\int_{0}\^{}{\omega\\_{cut}}\eta(\omega)\,\hbar\omega\,d\omega$\rho$\_vacT=u\_T41$\int$0$\omega$\_cutќЈ($\omega$)вДП$\omega$d$\omega$, where ќЈ($\omega$)\eta(\omega)ќЈ($\omega$) is the spectral density index from ID\,015 and $\omega$\_cut\omega\\_{cut}\omega$\_cut is a high-frequency cutoff determined by $\HD$.\\
Minimal-energy helical configurations satisfy $\partial$S/$\partial$b = 0, which implies b = 2\,ln\,$\phi$/$\pi$. Thus circular measure $\pi$ and golden-ratio scaling $\phi$ are rigidly coupled.

derivation_layer.source_latex:
\tzpsection{Direct Equation Progression}
\begin{enumerate}[leftmargin=1.6em,itemsep=7pt,topsep=4pt]
\item \textbf{Canonical Relation}
\[
VolumetricStillnessAxiom := Axiom[
\]
This relation is retained from the source-repair evidence for THE $\pi$-KISSING MANIFOLD AXIOM.

\item \textbf{Support Relation}
\[
The vacuum energy density at the TZP is defined as $\rho$\_vacT=1u\_T4 $\int$0$\omega$\_cutќЈ($\omega$) вДП$\omega$ d$\omega$\rho\\_{vac}\textsuperscript{{T}=\frac{1}{u\\_{T}}4}\,\int_{0}\^{}{\omega\\_{cut}}\eta(\omega)\,\hbar\omega\,d\omega$\rho$\_vacT=u\_T41$\int$0$\omega$\_cutќЈ($\omega$)вДП$\omega$d$\omega$, where ќЈ($\omega$)\eta(\omega)ќЈ($\omega$) is the spectral density index from ID\,015 and $\omega$\_cut\omega\\_{cut}\omega$\_cut is a high-frequency cutoff determined by $\HD$.\\
\]
This relation is retained from the source-repair evidence for THE $\pi$-KISSING MANIFOLD AXIOM.

\item \textbf{Closure Relation}
\[
\DNAManifold = \sum_{i=1}^{3 \times 10^9} |DNA_i\rangle \otimes |DAAN_{i \pmod{153600}}\rangle \otimes |Kissing_{\lfloor i/153600 \rfloor}\rangle
\]
This relation is retained from the source-repair evidence for THE $\pi$-KISSING MANIFOLD AXIOM.

\item \textbf{Auxiliary Relation}
\[
\Psi_{\text{BCS}}(r,t) = U(r)e^{iS(r,t)/\hbar} \quad \text{where } S(r,t) = \int L_{\text{Josephson}} dt
\]
This relation is retained from the source-repair evidence for THE $\pi$-KISSING MANIFOLD AXIOM.

\item \textbf{Review Relation}
\[
Minimal-energy helical configurations satisfy $\partial$S/$\partial$b = 0, which implies b = 2\,ln\,$\phi$/$\pi$. Thus circular measure $\pi$ and golden-ratio scaling $\phi$ are rigidly coupled.
\]
This relation is retained from the source-repair evidence for THE $\pi$-KISSING MANIFOLD AXIOM.

\end{enumerate}

\tzpsection{Proof}
The proof route is review-conditioned: verify that the listed source equations are mutually admissible in the entry's TRAWIN-normalized frame.
